name: Tyler Oliveira
oneLine: American YouTuber making man-on-the-street and investigative-style documentaries on provocative topics.
bio: Tyler Oliveira (born January 6, 2000) is an American YouTuber with over 8.5 million subscribers and 2.2 billion views. He started in challenge content before pivoting to man-on-the-street interviews, social experiments and self-styled investigative documentaries on underreported or controversial subjects, including drug decriminalization in Canada, Jeffrey Epstein's island and the Springfield pet-eating hoax. His content is not comedy; it presents itself as investigative journalism, though outlets including the Anti-Defamation League and The Forward have argued some of his videos misrepresent interviewees and traffic in misleading editing or stereotypes.
style: Long-form first-person documentary and immersion videos on YouTube (NOT comedy)
notable: I Investigated the Drug Overdose Capital of America
I Snuck Onto Jeffrey Epstein's Island
